emails.subject: I NEED VERIFICATION...
emails.body: I NEED VERIFICATION... PATRICE: Could you verify the long descriptions for the attached locations. CORA: Please verify Pipe, Trade Zone and Facility. #1 Name :NBPL/MANGTN The interconnection between The Peoples Gas Light Coke Company and Northern Border Pipeline Company located in Cook County, Illinois (Meter No. 82). Pipe: NBPL Trade Zone: PEOPLES FACILITY: 82 #2 Name: PGLC Pool The interconnection between The Peoples Gas Light Coke Company and Natural Gas Pipeline Company of America. Pipe: PGLC Trade Zone:TTP/TTP FACILITY: TTP #3 Name: NGPL Peoples- The interconnection between The Peoples Gas Light Coke Company and Northern Border Pipeline Company located in Cook County, Illinois. Pipe: NGPL Trade Zone:PEOPLES FACILITY: 909285 Thanks, Melba Lozano 713-345-8986 713-646-8511 Fax 713-698-4847 Pager

emails.subject: RE: I NEED VERIFICATION...
emails.body: RE: I NEED VERIFICATION... Melba, On location #1--I want the name to be NGPL/MANHATTEN--is this too many characters?

emails.subject: RE: I NEED VERIFICATION...
emails.body: Patrice, That's fine.... Did the long descriptions look good? ML

emails.subject: FW: I NEED VERIFICATION...
emails.body: FW: I NEED VERIFICATION... Patrice, I need you to verify just one more time for us the description. Cora asked me to change the description for PGLC Pool. Please verify. Thanks, Melba Lozano 713-345-8986 713-646-8511 Fax 713-698-4847 Pager #1 Name :NBPL/MANGTN The interconnection between The Peoples Gas Light Coke Company and Northern Border Pipeline Company located in Cook County, Illinois (Meter No. 82). Pipe: NBPL Trade Zone: PEOPLES FACILITY: 82 #2 Name: PGLC Pool The transaction is for delivery to the Title Transfer Point for The Peoples Gas Light Coke Company. Pipe: PGLC Trade Zone:TTP/TTP FACILITY: TTP #3 Name: NGPL Peoples- The interconnection between The Peoples Gas Light Coke Company and Northern Border Pipeline Company located in Cook County, Illinois. Pipe: NGPL Trade Zone:PEOPLES FACILITY: 909285
